description_long: This is a modern, rectangular sink with a deep single basin and a flat, wide rim. The sink is finished in a sleek, glossy black, giving it a contemporary and stylish appearance. A tall, curved faucet with a metallic finish is mounted at the rear right corner, accompanied by a single lever handle for water control. The drain is centrally located at the bottom of the basin, and the overall design is minimalistic with clean lines. The sink appears to be made primarily of ceramic or composite material, with metal components for the faucet and handle. There is no visible overflow hole, and the mounting style suggests it is a drop-in sink suitable for urban environments such as public restrooms, parks, or outdoor facilities.
description: A sleek, glossy black rectangular sink with a deep basin, central drain, and a tall curved metallic faucet. The design is modern and minimalistic, suitable for urban settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the deep rectangular basin, central drain, and the tall curved faucet with a single lever handle on the right.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the basin and the profile of the faucet, with the flat rim extending outward.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the faucet and handle, with the basin's interior less visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the basin's depth and the faucet's curve from a different angle.
